response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience with strong fundamentals, current Staff-level work at Stripe touching AI-agent infrastructure, and proven craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure at scale, or statistical analysis — the core domain of this Principal IC6 role. Seniority and breadth justify a conversation, but the domain gap is significant for a principal-level growth/experimentation hire.
strengths: 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data services (Sociomantic millions of req/s)
Current Staff Engineer at Stripe with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling exposure
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, trunk-based dev, CI/CD, open-source test frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flag platform experience
No evidence of metrics/telemetry platform building or statistical analysis depth
Limited signal on multi-team platform leadership and cross-org stakeholder influence at IC6 scale

key_factors.factor: Senior tenure at high-scale companies (Stripe, Shopify, Sociomantic)
Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot breadth
